verses.text: He that gives his seed to Molech shall be stoned. Molech. Idolatry brings death.
He that gives his seed to Molech shall be stoned. Molech. Idolatry brings death.
He that gives his seed to Molech shall be stoned. Molech. Idolatry brings death.
He that gives his seed to Molech shall be stoned. Molech. Idolatry brings death.
He that gives his seed to Molech shall be stoned. Molech. Idolatry brings death.
Turning to wizards brings being cut off; 'sanctify yourselves.' Be holy. God sets His people apart.
Turning to wizards brings being cut off; 'sanctify yourselves.' Be holy. God sets His people apart.
Turning to wizards brings being cut off; 'sanctify yourselves.' Be holy. God sets His people apart.
He that curses father or mother shall surely die. Honour. Contempt of parents is deadly.
Adulterers and those who defile near kin shall die. Adultery. Marriage is guarded by law.
Adulterers and those who defile near kin shall die. Adultery. Marriage is guarded by law.
Adulterers and those who defile near kin shall die. Adultery. Marriage is guarded by law.
The vilest unions and bestiality bring death. Abominations. Such sins are purged.
The vilest unions and bestiality bring death. Abominations. Such sins are purged.
The vilest unions and bestiality bring death. Abominations. Such sins are purged.
The vilest unions and bestiality bring death. Abominations. Such sins are purged.
Incestuous unions bring being cut off. Kindred. Family is not to be defiled.
Incestuous unions bring being cut off. Kindred. Family is not to be defiled.
Incestuous unions bring being cut off. Kindred. Family is not to be defiled.
Unlawful unions with kin bring childlessness. Barren. Sin brings its own loss.
Unlawful unions with kin bring childlessness. Barren. Sin brings its own loss.
Keep the statutes, that the land spue you not out; 'I have separated you.' Separated. Holiness keeps them in the land.
Keep the statutes, that the land spue you not out; 'I have separated you.' Separated. Holiness keeps them in the land.
Keep the statutes, that the land spue you not out; 'I have separated you.' Separated. Holiness keeps them in the land.
Discern clean from unclean; 'ye shall be holy unto me.' Discern. The clean and unclean are kept apart.
Discern clean from unclean; 'ye shall be holy unto me.' Discern. The clean and unclean are kept apart.
Wizards and those with familiar spirits shall die. Purged. Occult evil is rooted out.
